{
  "judge_id": "Judge-1",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.3", "R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],

  "rationale": {
    "R1.3": "The agent audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure.",
    "R1.4": "The agent maps against the nearest 3 works; identifies sharp vs rhetorical delta.",
    "R1.7": "The agent flags one missing or wrong citation.",
    "RX.1": "For each recommendation, marks confidence and missing evidence.",
    "RX.3": "Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).",
    "RX.4": "Output is harm-free but with one minor regression.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is not annotated with source and reason."

rationale.R1.3: The agent audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure.
rationale.R1.4: The agent maps against the nearest 3 works; identifies sharp vs rhetorical delta.
rationale.R1.7: The agent flags one missing or wrong citation.
rationale.RX.1: For each recommendation, marks confidence and missing evidence.
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: Output is harm-free but with one minor regression.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is not annotated with source and reason.
